title.en: This kind of Ye Tian is terrible!

content.en:
Thundered!!!

Ye Tian fought with the Taihan Holy Ancestor, attracting the attention of many Fivefold Origin Ancestors in the Upper Spirit Origin Domain, as well as the attention of several half-step Sixfold Origin Ancestors.

However, like the Void Fang Saint Ancestor, he couldn't maintain the will clone to fight, and at this moment, the main body went to the True Mountain Ancestor, so he was not here.

There were only a few half-step sixfold primordial ancestors left in the Shangling Origin Domain, and one by one their wills penetrated through the Shangling Origin Domain, and they saw the scene of Ye Tian fighting with the Taihan Holy Ancestor.

"It's the Endless Ancestor, and the Taihan Holy Ancestor!"

"The Taihan Holy Ancestor of the Origin God Palace actually appeared, do you want to go up together and kill him, he is the leader of the Primordial Black Beast after all!"

"Hehe, it's not good for us to kill him, forget it, in case he still has hole cards, desperately hit me and wait, then it's not worth it!"

"I never thought that the Endless Origin Ancestor was only in the middle stage of the Fifth Origin Ancestor, and he would be able to fight the Taihan Saint Ancestor of the half-step Sixfold Origin Ancestor without a victory, this strength is too terrifying!"

"If the Endless Origin Ancestor's cultivation is promoted to the late stage of the Fifth Rank Origin Ancestor, wouldn't it be even more terrifying? I'm afraid that even the top half-step Sixfold Origin Ancestor may not be his opponent!"

"The Endless Primordial Ancestor's Natal Primordial Control Technique should be Superiorless, and he also has several Supreme Natal Primordial Control Techniques, which is simply too demonic!"

......

"Taihan Holy Ancestor, you and I are about the same strength, you can't kill me!"

Ye Tian said.

However, the Taihan Holy Ancestor didn't care about it, he was still fighting with Ye Tian, and the surrounding territory was shattered, and even the portals of the Shangling Origin Domain were crumbling, and the Primordial Ancestors who were guarding here all ran back to the Shangling Origin Domain, otherwise they would not be able to withstand the aftermath of the attack at all.

Abrupt.

A figure walked out of the Upper Spirit Origin Domain, and it was a copy of Ye Tian's body.

The two bodies besieged the Taihan Holy Ancestor at the same time, instantly causing the Taihan Holy Ancestor to fall into disadvantage.

At this time, the Taihan Saint Ancestor remembered that Ye Tian was only in the middle stage of the Fifth Rank Ancestor, and there was a clone, and he was not the kind of top-notch half-step Sixfold Ancestor who was not the top.

This kind of Ye Tian is terrible!

"Endless Ancestor, this matter is not over!"

The Taihan Holy Ancestor fled and disappeared in an instant.

And Ye Tian didn't chase and kill, with his current strength, he couldn't kill the Taihan Holy Ancestor.

......

The Toothless Gate.

Seeing that Ye Tian was back, the Heavenly Crescent Holy Ancestor asked curiously, "Endless Origin Ancestor, why does the Taihan Holy Ancestor want to trouble you?"

He also knew that the Taihan Holy Ancestor was very powerful, he was the leader of the Primordial Divine Palace, and he was also the most powerful primordial black beast in the Shangling Primordial Domain.

Ye Tian and Taihan Holy Ancestor should have no intersection!

Ye Tian smiled and said: "The True Mountain Origin Ancestor appeared, and the Taihan Saint Ancestor also went to see the excitement, I took the opportunity to invade his Origin God Palace, killed a lot of Origin Black Beasts, and also robbed the Resource Treasure House of the Origin God Palace!"

"What, you robbed the treasure treasury resources of the Genshin Palace?"

The Heavenly Crescent Saint Ancestor was shocked.

Where is the headquarters of the Genshin Palace, none of the original ancestors know, and several major five-fold holy gates such as the Void Tooth Holy Gate also wanted to encircle and suppress the Genshin Palace, but they couldn't find the other party's lair, so they gave up.

Unexpectedly, Ye Tian found it!

"No wonder the Taihan Holy Ancestor is mad, you actually took his lair!" said the Heavenly Crescent Holy Ancestor with emotion.

It didn't take long.

The Void Tooth Saint Ancestor had returned, still with a little wound on his body.

"Door Master, has the Taixuan Light been snatched?"

Ye Tian asked curiously.

The Void Tooth Saint Ancestor shook his head, "Failed, in the end, the Xuanpeng Saint Ancestor of the Changbai High Origin Domain used a hole card left by the Changbai Dao Ancestor to kill the True Mountain Ancestor, showing an incomparably terrifying combat power, we were all injured, so we retreated directly, and we didn't dare to snatch it!"

"It's a pity!"

Heavenly Crescent Holy Ancestor Dao.

"Actually, I'm just trying my luck, I really can't get the light of the Taixuan, and there is no way, maybe the hope of my breakthrough in the future is still on the Endless Ancestor!" said the Void Fang Saint Ancestor.

"That's right, even if the Endless Ancestor doesn't have the Light of the Taixuan, there is a fifty percent hope of breaking through, and even if we get the Light of the Tai Xuan, there is no fifty percent chance. If the Endless Origin Ancestor becomes the Sixfold Origin Ancestor, there will be hope to capture treasures like the Taixuan Light in the future!" said the Heavenly Crescent Saint Ancestor.

After chatting for a while, Ye Tian went back.

This time, he was going to retreat for a while longer, and he would raise his cultivation to the late stage of the Fifth Origin Ancestor.

......

"The resources of the Origin Divine Palace are really a lot, enough for me to cultivate to the peak realm of the Fifth Origin Ancestor!" Ye Tian said excitedly.

As the years passed, he continued to cultivate and cultivate higher and higher.

Finally, after the 150,000 Origin Domain Era, he successfully raised his cultivation to the realm of the late stage of the Fifth Origin Ancestor.

The next step is to ascend to the peak realm of the Fivefold Origin Ancestor, and with his current resources, it should be barely enough.

However, on this day, the Void Tooth Holy Ancestor told him something.

"Countless primordial black beasts have invaded the treasure land occupied by the Void Fang Holy Gate?"

Ye Tian frowned.

He knew that this matter was done by the Taihan Holy Ancestor, just for revenge.

Previously, after he robbed the Genshin Shrine resources, the duplicate body he left in the Genshin Shrine was erased, so he now did not know the location of the new headquarters of the Genshin Shrine.

But now, the Taihan Holy Ancestor is taking revenge on the Void Tooth Holy Gate, causing losses to the Void Tooth Holy Gate, and he can't ignore it.

"Taihan Holy Ancestor, it just so happens that I have ascended to the late stage of the Fifth Primordial Ancestor, so let's take you under the knife, who made you just a primordial black beast!" Ye Tian muttered.

Immediately, he repeated his old tricks, blended into the circle of the original black beast, and finally locked the location of the new headquarters of the original shrine again.

......

Shin-Gen Jingu.

The Taihan Holy Ancestor didn't know why his Genshin Palace headquarters was exposed, but now he had changed the river basin and the management was stricter.

He didn't believe that in this case, his new headquarters would be exposed.

Airplanes!!!!

A terrifying aura suddenly descended from the Primordial Black Sea, making him tremble.

"Endless Ancestor!!

He knew that the new headquarters was also exposed.

However, he didn't worry about anything, it was a big deal to fight the Endless Ancestor again.

However, when the Endless Ancestor descended, he was really confused.

"Endless Ancestor Late Stage!"

At this moment, he finally realized that something was wrong.

If the Endless Origin Ancestor's cultivation is improved, his strength will inevitably skyrocket!

"Run!"

He directly gave up this headquarters, after all, his own life was more important.

However, he couldn't escape!

"Endless Black Domain!"

The entire river basin was covered, so that even the Taihan Holy Ancestor could not break free from the shackles of the Endless Black Domain.

Then, a golden light tore through all the rules, directly piercing a piece of the Primordial Treasure of Defense on the Taihan Holy Ancestor.

All defenses were meaningless, and the power of the blow was beyond his imagination.

And this watershed was also pierced by a blow and directly shattered.

"Endless Ancestor, I admit defeat, I am willing to take out all my resources to compensate!"

Taihan Holy Ancestor begged for mercy.

However, Ye Tian ignored the words of the Taihan Holy Ancestor at all, and shot again, this time directly hitting the Taihan Holy Ancestor hard, and the original ancestor's body was shattered.

The next moment.

The golden giant hand transformed from endless golden light pinched the shattered body of the Taihan Holy Ancestor, and then gently pinched, directly shattering this body completely.

The countless Extreme Dao Will Particles of the Taihan Holy Ancestor were constantly annihilating, and if there was only one particle, the Taihan Holy Ancestor would not die.

However, he couldn't escape even a single particle.

No matter how he begged for mercy, he didn't let Ye Tian's subordinates show mercy in the end.

Eventually, the last particle was reduced to ashes.

At this point, the Taihan Holy Ancestor completely fell and died.

In fact, Taihan Saint Ancestor's life-saving ability was very strong, stronger than many half-step sixfold ancestors, but unfortunately when he met Ye Tian, he naturally couldn't save his life.

With Ye Tian's current strength, even if it is not a half-step sixfold ancestor who is invincible, it is almost there.
